_comment: Copy to ~/.codebuddy/sensory-rules.json and run buddy server with CODEBUDDY_SENSORY_RULES=true + CODEBUDDY_SENSORY_TOKEN. Event data reaches shell/agent actions ONLY via env (VISION_KIND, VISION_CAMERA, VISION_DESC, VISION_IMAGE, VISION_SALIENCE) + stdin JSON — never interpolated. Destructive commands (rm -rf, dd, sudo, ...) are hard-blocked.

rules.name: Log every person arrival to a file
Person at night -> fire a webhook (e.g. Home Assistant turns a light on)
Person entered -> let the agent decide what to do (uses its own tool guardrails)

action.prompt: Someone just appeared on camera $VISION_CAMERA: $VISION_DESC. Decide if anything should be logged or notified, briefly.
